description: Remove temporary shoring that was put in place to stabilize the perimeter masonry walls under permit 18-34871-RNVS. New work under this permit will include the new internal structure consisting of new foundation, upper floor framing and roof framing to replace the floor framing that collapsed. Work also includes underground electrical and plumbing service that would need to be in place prior to the new foundation. A new elevator pit and two new fire exit stairs are included in the work. This is a no occupancy permit and no mechanical work. Interior build-out will be permitted separately. Benchmark certificate to be provided with occupancy permit.

This is new construction of one commercial office space on the ground floor, 2 residential units on the second floor and 2 residential units on the third floor. There will five garages on the main floor of the building behind the commercial office space. The garage associated with the office space will have will be HC Van Accessible. Each garage will have an electric charging outlet for an electric car. The roof will have solar panels to achieve a "net zero" on electricity cost for each unit.

address: 537 Dumaine St Apt A, FULL BUILDING
description: VCC Application for building located at 533-537 Dumaine Street: to remove deteriorated balcony floorboards [3rd floor ONLY] and install new Aeratis Traditions T&G floorboards as per VCC Standard Detail Sheet No. 12 [to be obtained from VCC in advance of work]. Paint on-site to match existing color + sheen [white, semigloss]. This work will also require that an additional wood purlin be added to the 3rd floor balcony - matching existing in size- and installed so all purlins are spaced evenly across depth of balcony. The floorboards, while newly painted a few years ago during a full-building renovation, were never replaced at this time and are deteriorated across the full facade of the building, needing to be replaced asap. See attached photos of damage from Owner's foot going through. NO WORK to be performed on 2nd floor gallery.

Project consists of site work associated with the installation of temporary trailers for a school to include classrooms, administration, cafeteria, and toilet facilities. NOTE: These buildings are not temporrary from a construction standpoint being attached to permanent foundations and built nmore in the manner of manufactured buildings than "trailers". The duration of their use and exisitence is planned to be short [years] but in reality is unknown [decades]. R.Gaither 4/3/19
